mapper.select: SELECT r.id AS run_id, r.task_id, r.turn_id, r.run_uuid, r.idempotency_key, t.system_prompt FROM agent_run r JOIN agent_task t ON t.id = r.task_id WHERE r.id = #{runId}

INSERT INTO agent_task (user_id, title, status, system_prompt, metadata, created_at, updated_at) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{title}, 'active', #{systemPrompt}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbMapTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id
INSERT INTO agent_turn (task_id, sequence_no, status, created_at, updated_at) VALUES (#{taskId}, DEFAULT, 'running', NOW(), NOW()) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO agent_message ( task_id, turn_id, role, content, sequence_no, status, token_estimate, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{turnId}, 'user', #{content}, DEFAULT, 'active', #{tokenEstimate}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbMapTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO agent_message ( task_id, turn_id, role, content, sequence_no, status, token_estimate, metadata, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{turnId}, 'assistant', #{content}, DEFAULT, 'active', #{tokenEstimate}, #{metadata,jdbcType=OTHER,typeHandler=org.congcong.algomentor.agent.persistence.postgres.json.JsonbMapTypeHandler}, NOW(), NOW() ) RETURNING id

INSERT INTO agent_run ( task_id, turn_id, run_uuid, attempt_no, idempotency_key, trigger_type, status, max_steps, started_at ) VALUES ( #{taskId}, #{turnId}, #{runUuid}, DEFAULT, #{idempotencyKey}, 'user_request', 'running', #{maxSteps}, NOW() ) RETURNING id
mapper.update: UPDATE agent_turn SET user_message_id = #{userMessageId}, current_run_id = #{runId}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{turnId}
UPDATE agent_turn SET assistant_message_id = #{assistantMessageId}, status = 'succeeded', updated_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{turnId}
mapper.select: SELECT id, task_id, sequence_no, role, content, created_at, metadata FROM agent_message WHERE id = #{messageId} AND status = 'active'
SELECT id AS run_id, task_id, run_uuid, idempotency_key, started_at FROM agent_run WHERE task_id = #{taskId} AND status = 'running' ORDER BY started_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1
